positive: A detailed, vintage botanical illustration of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns, rendered in the style of an antique scientific etching, deep forest green and muted gold palette, high contrast, elegant cross-hatching, surrounded by delicate vines. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photographic, harsh lines, messy
